working_on.task: Save brain, finalize tracker state, commit and push the completed Sprint 1-5 worktree
working_on.notes: Sprint 3 is now 10/10 after PM accepted template-based E2E import verification for S3-9. Sprint 5 is already 14/14. Next product phase is Sprint 4 real-user onboarding.

pending_tasks.task: Sprint 4 kickoff: onboard 1-2 recruiter noi bo and capture friction logs
Manual browser QA for import page, pipeline board, and client detail after latest large batch
Consider upgrading Postgres SSL connection strings to sslmode=verify-full

recent_changes.description: Completed Sprint 3 deploy hardening: Vercel + Neon live deployment, Sentry optional setup, Neon pooled Prisma config, and production verification
Completed Sprint 5 scale and backlog fixes: team scope, schema-first validation, CRM-FDIWork sync, import UX, trash restore, view batching, paginated clients, subscription expiry, and search indexing
Added client import flow with row validation, dedup by companyName/website, import page split by entity type, and template guide updates
Fixed spreadsheet header normalization for Vietnamese Đ/đ and verified candidate/client template import end-to-end on dev/staging via dedicated script
Closed S3-9 after PM accepted template-based import verification and marked Sprint 3 complete in the tracker

errors_encountered.error: Candidate/client import parser failed to map Vietnamese headers containing Đ/đ
errors_encountered.solution: Normalize header text by replacing đ with d before removing combining marks; rerun template import verification and repair partially imported template rows

errors_encountered.error: Initial build failed because generic Object.entries inference treated aliases as unknown
errors_encountered.solution: Cast Object.entries(headerAliases) to Array<[TField, string[]]> in spreadsheet import utils

decisions_made.decision: Use Neon instead of Supabase wording for pooled Postgres infrastructure
decisions_made.reason: The app is Prisma/serverless centric and only needs managed Postgres, not BaaS features

decisions_made.decision: Treat docs/templates as sufficient Sprint 3 verification input for S3-9
decisions_made.reason: PM explicitly accepted template-based E2E import verification to close the sprint

decisions_made.decision: Keep import candidate/client logic in shared service layer and keep server actions thin
decisions_made.reason: Matches recent refactor direction away from direct Prisma usage in actions

verification.notes: Build passed after adding client import flow
Template import verified on dev/staging; candidate and client sample data present
Final clean checkpoint after closing S3-9 in tracker
